about.title: About LogIQ Transport
about.metaDescription: Discover LogIQ Transport: 24/7 connected utility vehicle rental on the Swiss Riviera. Self-service pick-up, online booking, modern service.
about.hook: Utility vehicle rental has barely evolved in decades.
about.p1: In most cases, renting a utility van still means going to an agency, sticking to fixed hours, dealing with lengthy paperwork and hoping the vehicle is actually available when you need it.
about.p2: For many individuals and professionals, this turns a simple rental into an unnecessary waste of time.
about.p3: LogIQ Transport was born from this observation.
about.p4: The idea was simple: rethink utility vehicle rental to make it faster, smoother and more reliable.
about.p5: Today, we offer a modern experience where booking, vehicle access and rental management are simplified to the maximum. Thanks to digitalised processes, our customers can book a van online and access their vehicle in minutes, without the constraints of a traditional agency.
about.solutionTitle: A solution designed for real situations
about.solutionIntro: Moving, construction site, equipment transport or bulky purchase.
about.solutionNeed: When you need a van, you simply want:
about.solutionConclusion: LogIQ Transport was designed to meet exactly these needs.
about.solution1: Situations requiring a utility van are often unexpected.
about.solution2: A move, a construction site, transporting equipment or simply buying a bulky piece of furniture.
about.solution3: In these moments, what customers expect is not a complicated service. They simply want a vehicle that is available, reliable and easy to use.
about.solution4: LogIQ Transport was designed with this logic.
about.solution5: Our approach is to simplify every step:
about.solution6: The result is a smoother, more seamless experience for our customers.
about.hubTitle: Why the LogIQ Hub changes the rental experience
about.hubIntro:
LogIQ vans are not scattered across different agencies.
They are centralised in secure hubs designed to offer:
about.hubConclusion: The LogIQ Hub becomes the operational centre of the service.
about.hub1: At the heart of LogIQ Transport is the LogIQ hub. Rather than scattering vehicles across different locations or depending on a physical agency, LogIQ centralises its fleet in dedicated, secure spaces.
about.hub3: The hub thus becomes the operational centre of the service.
about.hub4: This is what enables LogIQ Transport to offer a more reliable, organised and professional utility vehicle rental.
about.philoIntro: Three principles guide every decision at LogIQ Transport.

philoItems.title: Simplicity
philoItems.desc: A rental should be intuitive and fast.

philoItems.title: Reliability
philoItems.desc: A clear service, well-maintained vehicles and transparent rules.

philoItems.title: Efficiency
philoItems.desc: Every step should be optimised to save customers time.

about.mission2: To offer the simplest and most reliable way to rent a utility van.
about.mission3: LogIQ Transport is for those looking for a modern, efficient and hassle-free service.
about.mission4: Because when a utility van is needed, the only thing that should matter is getting behind the wheel and moving forward.

rates.title: Rates

rates.hubText: Pick-up & return at the Vevey Hub.
rates.packsSubtitle: Choose the offer that fits your need.
rates.standardHook: The essentials, at the best price.
standardIncludes: Pick-up & return at the Vevey Hub
confortIncludes: Pick-up & return at the Vevey Hub
Sérénité+ included: deductible reduced to CHF 500 (instead of CHF 2,000)
premiumIncludes: Pick-up & return at the Vevey Hub
rates.packAntiCompare: Designed for moving: kit included + more km, to avoid surcharges.
rates.extraKmDesc: Each plan includes a km allowance (100 km/day for Weekday and Weekend, 200 km for the 48h Pack). Beyond that, each extra kilometre is charged at
rates.proCalloutText: Access our business offers (invoicing, dedicated conditions, priority based on availability).

reservation.title: Quick booking
reservation.subtitle: Book online in 3 steps. Pickup available 24/7.
reservation.microlegal: Booking is confirmed once LogIQ Transport validates the reservation.
reservation.paymentCanceled: Payment cancelled. You can try again.
reservation.successDesc: Your booking request has been sent successfully. We'll get back to you shortly by email to confirm the details.
reservation.sereniteInfo: Reduces the standard deductible from CHF 2,000 to CHF 500 per claim

pro.title: For Pros — Self-service vans, business invoicing
pro.subtitle: Online booking, autonomous pickup, ideal for tradespeople, property managers, movers, and events.
pro.flexConditions: Prices excl. VAT • VAT 8.1% added • 200 km/day included • Immediate payment
pro.carnetsConditions: Prepaid • Weekdays only (Mon–Thu) • 100% upfront payment • Non-refundable • Valid 6 months • 24/7 access • Booking priority included • Advance booking recommended
pro.paymentImmediate: Immediate payment (card / payment link) by default.
pro.paymentInvoice: Net-30 invoicing may be offered to select Pro accounts after validation.
pro.ruleDriver: Driver must be 21+ with B licence held for 2+ years (as per T&Cs).
pro.ruleFuel: Vehicle returned with the same fuel level.
pro.ruleDeposit: Card hold required before departure (as per T&Cs).
pro.formSubtitle: Fill in the form below and we'll get back to you within 24h.
pro.formThanksDesc: Our Pro team will contact you within 24 business hours.
pro.bottomCtaSubtitle: Degressive pro rates, business invoicing, 100% online booking.

seo.homeDesc: Rent a van in 3 clicks, no agency, 24/7. Self-service pickup in Vevey from 129 CHF/day. Book online in under 2 minutes.
seo.ratesDesc: Discover our transparent rates: from 129 CHF/day weekdays, 149 CHF weekends. Moving packs and options available.
seo.vehiclesDesc: Browse our fleet of clean, ready-to-go vans. Available 24/7 in Vevey for self-service pickup.
seo.faqDesc: Find answers about LogIQ van rental: documents, insurance, mileage, cancellation and payment.
seo.contactDesc: Contact LogIQ Transport for any questions about van rental in Vevey. Quick response by email or phone.
seo.proDesc: Van rental solutions for businesses and contractors. Preferential rates, monthly invoicing and Pro booklets.
seo.cglDesc: Read LogIQ Transport general rental terms: responsibilities, insurance, mileage and cancellation policy.
